title: SCIP multilingual symbol relation adapter
goal: Normalize external SCIP definition/reference data into Lenskit evidence records without introducing a second bundle truth or trusting index completeness.

acceptance.assertion: SCIP input is versioned, provenance-bound, language-labelled and converted through a deterministic adapter.
Missing indexers, partial documents and unsupported relationships remain explicit degradation states.
Each promoted language has a fixed precision and navigation benchmark before consumer enablement.

metadata.source_request: User requested all Symbol Call Graph work to be registered and implemented.
